title: cyperus afroalpinus
intro: Cyperus afroalpinus, also known as Afro-alpine flatsedge, is a plant species native to the high-altitude regions of Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds and skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, Cyperus afroalpinus is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or topical paste for its medicinal uses.
